result.stdout:
Usage: streams [options]

Options:
  --port <int>       Port to listen on (default: 5000)
  --data <path>      SQLite database path (default: ./data/noundry-streams.db)
  --api-key <string> API key for authentication (optional)
  --log-dir <path>   Log directory (default: ./logs)
  --help, -h         Show this help
